title: mentha virescens
intro: Mentha virescens, also known as green mint or mint-scented violas, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, antifungal, and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Mentha virescens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of Mentha virescens include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
